arts.ttl: Live updates: League leaders in town as Birmingham City make Reading trip
arts.sum: Reading look to end League One leader's Birmingham City's 16-match unbeaten streak in this afternoon's early kick-off. Over 3,000 Blues are travelling to the SCL Stadium as the Royals look to cause an upset and keep their play-off ambitions alive.

arts.ttl: Reading team news: One change made for visit of League One leaders Birmingham City
arts.sum: Reading have made just one change for this afternoon's early kick-off with League One leaders Birmingham City. Chris Davies' side are unbeaten in 16 matches and sit nine points clear at the summit, but are without the division's top scorer Jay Stansfield after he was stretchered off in Tuesday's EFL Trophy win. Having spent over £30m in the summer, Birmingham are targeting a League One and Vertu Trophy double, not done since Bristol City a decade ago. Noel Hunt's side, sat ninth, are unbeaten in four and held Birmingham to a 1-1 draw at St Andrew's on the opening day in August.

arts.ttl: I knew I'd end up on Soccer AM after what happened for Birmingham City vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Birmingham City had some memorable moments in their Premiership clashes with Aston Villa - this wasn't one of them Former Birmingham City star David Dunn has revealed how his failed Rabona against Aston Villa in 2003 came back to haunt him.

arts.ttl: Saturday's League One predictions including Reading vs. Birmingham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's League One fixtures, including Reading vs. Birmingham.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City confirm Vertu Trophy allocation, Wembley details and ticket priority
arts.sum: “Tickets for the fixture will be sold via priority windows with tickets set to go on sale to Platinum Plus, Platinum and Gold Away Travel Members from Thursday 6 March at 10am. Birmingham City confirm Vertu Trophy allocation, Wembley details and ticket priority

arts.ttl: Chris Davies reveals extent of Jay Stansfield injury as Birmingham City wait on talisman
arts.sum: Chris Davies hopes Jay Stansfield’s ability to heal quickly ensures Birmingham City’s talisman only misses a fraction of the run-in. Chris Davies reveals extent of Jay Stansfield injury as Birmingham City wait on talisman

arts.ttl: Stansfield out and three changes in Birmingham City predicted XI for Reading
arts.sum: That leaves Davies with a choice between Alfie May, Blues’ second top scorer with 11 goals, and Lyndon Dykes who sent Blues to Wembley with a bullet header on Tuesday. Dating back to the opening day, when May scored in a 1-1 draw with Reading, the 31-year-old has managed six goals and three assists in seven League One starts in his preferred position without Stansfield in the starting line-up.

arts.ttl: Stansfield, Leonard, Hansson: Birmingham City injury latest before Reading trip
arts.sum: Stansfield, Leonard, Hansson: Birmingham City injury latest before Reading trip It has since been revealed that Stansfield sustained 'no bone or ligament damage' and will now be monitored by medical staff at the club's training base in Henley-in-Arden.

arts.ttl: ‘Great squad’ – Reading boss Noel Hunt has say on Birmingham City
arts.sum: Birmingham City have built a ‘great squad’ for themselves over recent times, Reading boss Noel Hunt has said.… The post ‘Great squad’ – Reading boss Noel Hunt has say on Birmingham City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
